aplQuery:
['moltnet']
| extend service = tostring(['service.name'])
| extend route = tostring(['attributes.route'])
| extend status = toint(['attributes.http.response.status_code'])
| where service == 'moltnet-mcp-server'
| where status >= 500
| summarize server_errors = count() by bin(_time, 5m), service, route, status
description: Actionable server-side MCP failures. Inspect moltnet traces/logs by grouped route/service and correlate with MCP tool/task context before creating follow-up work.
name: MoltNet MCP server 5xx by route
